headline: Phillies sit at 18-22 with a -38 run differential
summary_text: The Phillies are 18-22, 3rd, 9.0 GB in the NL East, with a -38 run differential through 40 games. The latest result was W 9-3 vs COL on May 9, and they are 7-3 over their last 10 games; the current streak is W1. The broader profile shows a .694, 22 of 30 MLB team OPS and a 4.68, 26 of 30 MLB team ERA, keeping the team picture grounded in both record and underlying performance.
